name: Airbrush - The Best AI-Powered Portrait Editor for Creators

keyFeatures.en: Enhance, retouch, and transform your images effortlessly with advanced AI tools.
keyFeatures.zh: 使用高级AI工具轻松增强、润饰和转换您的图像。

keyFeatures.en: Instant and effortless photo editing with AI.
keyFeatures.zh: 使用AI实现即时和轻松的照片编辑。

description.en: Start free or go Pro. Compare Web, Desktop & Mobile platform features and pricing.
description.zh: 免费开始或升级为Pro。比较Web、桌面和移动平台的功能和价格。

description.en: More advanced features and higher limits compared to the free plan.
description.zh: 相比免费计划，提供更多高级功能和更高限制。

weaknesses.en: Limited features and credits in the free plan.
weaknesses.zh: 免费计划中的功能和积分有限。

weaknesses.en: No specific details on pricing and features for other tiers.
weaknesses.zh: 未明确说明其他套餐的价格和功能。

targetAudience.en: From selfie editing to professional work, Airbrush is suitable for anyone looking to enhance and transform their images.
targetAudience.zh: 从自拍编辑到专业工作，Airbrush 适合任何希望增强和转换图像的人。

positioning.en: Airbrush is positioned as the best AI-powered portrait editor for creators, offering effortless and advanced photo editing tools.
positioning.zh: Airbrush 定位为创作者的最佳AI图像编辑器，提供轻松且高级的照片编辑工具。
